subject_zh: 圆润可爱的小型陪伴机器人
prompt_text: A small round companion robot with a glossy white ceramic body and soft rounded edges, standing knee-high. Its single large circular eye glows warm teal, expressing curiosity through subtle aperture changes. Two stubby articulated arms end in three-fingered rubber-padded hands. A tiny antenna on top tilts expressively like an ear. Faint seam lines and a chest panel with a glowing heart icon suggest friendliness. Shown on a clean white background in three-quarter view.
prompt_zh: 一个小巧的圆形陪伴机器人，拥有光滑的白色陶瓷机身和柔和的圆润边缘，大约膝盖高。它唯一的大圆眼发出温暖的青色光芒，通过微妙的光圈变化表达好奇。两条粗短的铰接手臂末端是三指橡胶垫手掌。顶部的小天线像耳朵一样富有表现力地倾斜。淡淡的接缝线和带有发光心形图标的胸板传递着友善。以四分之三视角展示在干净的白色背景上。

subject_zh: 身披藤蔓铠甲的优雅森林精灵弓箭手
prompt_text: An elegant forest elf archer with long silver-white hair braided with tiny living vines and blossoms. Pointed ears extend gracefully through the hair. Form-fitting armor crafted from layered green leaves and hardened bark plates, bound with golden thread. A carved wooden longbow rests across the back, a quiver of emerald-fletched arrows at the hip. Striking amber eyes with vertical pupils. Skin with a faint olive-green undertone. Full body character sheet on neutral parchment background.
prompt_zh: 一位优雅的森林精灵弓箭手，银白色长发编织着微小的活藤蔓和花朵。尖耳优美地从发间延伸。由层叠绿叶和硬化树皮板制成的贴身铠甲，以金线束缚。雕花木质长弓斜挎背后，翠绿羽毛箭矢的箭袋挂在腰间。引人注目的琥珀色竖瞳。皮肤带有淡淡的橄榄绿底色。以中性羊皮纸背景展示全身角色设定图。

subject_zh: 佩戴机械义肢的星际海盗船长
prompt_text: A rugged space pirate captain with weathered dark skin and a confident smirk, wearing a tattered leather duster over a reinforced flight suit. One arm replaced by a sleek gunmetal prosthetic with exposed hydraulic pistons and an integrated plasma blaster. A holographic eye patch projects a faint red targeting reticle over the left eye. Heavy magnetic boots and a utility belt loaded with alien gadgets. A cybernetic parrot perches on one shoulder. Character turnaround on dark starfield background.
prompt_zh: 一位粗犷的太空海盗船长，饱经风霜的深色皮肤和自信的坏笑，穿着破旧长皮风衣罩在加固飞行服外。一条手臂被光滑的枪灰色义肢取代，露出液压活塞和集成等离子爆能枪。全息眼罩在左眼上投射出微弱的红色瞄准光标。沉重的磁力靴和装满外星装置的工具腰带。一只电子鹦鹉栖息在肩头。以暗色星空为背景的角色转面设定图。

subject_zh: 戴着复杂护目镜的维多利亚时代发明家
prompt_text: A Victorian-era steampunk inventor, a middle-aged woman with wild curly auburn hair pinned messily with brass hairpins and small gears. She wears multi-lensed brass goggles on her forehead, a fitted waistcoat over a cream blouse with rolled sleeves. Her leather apron is stained with oil and scorch marks. One hand holds a delicate clockwork bird mid-assembly, the other grips a miniature welding torch. A mechanical backpack with extending copper arms rises behind her. Warm-toned studio background.
prompt_zh: 一位维多利亚时代的蒸汽朋克发明家，中年女性，狂野的卷曲赤褐色头发用黄铜发卡和小齿轮随意挽起。她戴着多镜片黄铜护目镜在额头上，穿着贴身马甲罩在卷起袖子的奶油色衬衫外。皮围裙沾满油渍和灼烧痕迹。一只手拿着正在组装中的精巧发条小鸟，另一只手握着微型焊枪。背后是带有伸缩铜臂的机械背包。暖色调工作室背景。

subject_zh: 融合东西方元素的独创神话生物
prompt_text: An original mythical creature blending Eastern and Western dragon aesthetics. Serpentine body covered in iridescent scales shifting between sapphire blue and jade green. A majestic deer-like head with branching crystal antlers that refract light into tiny rainbows. Four clawed limbs with feathered fetlocks support its sinuous frame. Flowing whiskers and a mane of cloud-like fur trail from jaw and spine. Large luminous golden eyes convey ancient wisdom. Translucent wings patterned like stained glass. Creature design sheet on grey background.
prompt_zh: 一种融合东西方龙美学的原创神话生物。蛇形身体覆盖着在宝蓝色和翠绿色之间变幻的虹彩鳞片。威严的鹿形头部，分叉的水晶鹿角将光折射成细小的彩虹。四肢带爪且有羽毛距毛，支撑着蜿蜒的身躯。飘逸的龙须和云雾般的鬃毛从下颚和脊背延伸。大而明亮的金色眼睛传达着远古的智慧。半透明翅膀图案如彩色玻璃窗。灰色背景上的生物设计图。
